id-72529.title: Web Developer Portfolio
id-72529.post-content:
The Web Developer Portfolio template is a stylish dark design designed to communicate your skills immediately with stylized animation, code-like typography, and simple colors. There’s instant recognition with this template that would work amazingly well to showcase your work.

The template includes essential portfolio elements such as support for images, video, and audio. It also comes with readymade pages for your portfolio, services, resume, and biography so you can be up and running in no time.

Key features of the Web Developer Portfolio template

  • Stylized website theme ideal for the niche
  • Smart animations to draw attention and engage
  • Immediately reminiscent of code and development without being over the top
  • Includes essential pages ideal for portfolios
  • Full compatibility with leading page builders
id-72529.post-excerpt: The Web Developer Portfolio template is perfect for anyone who works with code

id-60361.title: Home and Garden Decor
id-60361.post-content:
The Home & Garden Décor template has a flat, modern feel with lots of whitespace, great colors and lots of opportunities to build a high conversion online store. The content blocks deliver lots of opportunities to showcase products, special offers and calls to action.

The fully responsive template also includes attractive product pages, an effective cart page and a frictionless checkout page ready to sell. It looks amazing as it is but you can change everything you see using free tools.

Key features of the Home & Garden Décor template

  • Elegant eCommerce store template for home or garden
  • Calm colors and welcoming layout
  • Effective product, cart and checkout pages
  • Customize everything you see on the page
  • Full compatibility with leading page builders
id-60361.post-excerpt: Transform your living space into a sanctuary with our curated collection of exquisite home decor.

id-93049.title: Pub & Lounge
id-93049.post-content:
The Pub & Lounge template is crisp fullscreen design that welcomes you in from the very beginning. It’s lively and youthful and portrays the warm welcoming atmosphere people expect from a venue.

The template uses alternating dark and light areas and includes attractive menu sections. It’s a complete template an entertainment business needs to build a community. Everything you see can be fully customized and branded. You can add, remove or change anything on the page using built-in tools.

Key features of the Pub & Lounge template

  • Youthful and energetic entertainment template
  • Crisp design with alternating dark and light
  • Fast and easy to use
  • SEO friendly and fully responsive
  • Full compatibility with leading page builders
id-93049.post-excerpt: The Pub & Lounge template is ideal for vibrant bars, cozy pubs, and stylish lounges.

id-59486.title: Party Planner
id-59486.post-content:
Step into the world of seamless celebrations with our Party Planner website template. Crafted with stylish design ideal for the niche, this template sets the stage for unforgettable events, ideal for startups, small events businesses or party planners.

The professional-quality design adds a touch of elegance to your online presence, making your party planning services stand out. Elevate your business with ease and let the festivities begin with our exquisite template!

Key Features of the Part Planner Template:

  • Stylish design ideal for events and party planners
  • Infinitely customizable using built-in tools
  • Easy to use and requires no existing skills
  • Fully responsive and SEO friendly
  • Full compatibility with leading page builders
id-59486.post-excerpt: Elevate your party planning with our stylish website template.

id-93068.title: Real Estate Company
id-93068.post-content:
The Real Estate Company template has been designed to portray the image of a lifestyle, just like the real estate industry. It’s professional, elegant and maximizes space for property listings. It’s everything we look for in a design for an aspirational niche like property.

The design includes service sections, a property search function, featured property elements, contact form and more. Everything you see on the page evokes a feeling of luxury and can be customized to suit your exact needs using built-in tools.

Key features of the Real Estate Company template

  • Elegant template with a touch of luxury
  • Includes essential elements for the real estate industry
  • Can be installed in seconds and customized in minutes
  • SEO friendly and fully responsive
  • Full compatibility with leading page builders
id-93068.post-excerpt: The Real Estate Company template is ideal for property agencies, realtors, and real estate firms.

id-59354.title: Guitarist
id-59354.post-content:
The Guitarist template is an energetic music portfolio design ideal for singers, musicians, performers and other creatives. It helps tell your story with a cool black and white effect with bold contrast color.

The template uses a fullscreen hero section to set the scene while unfolding to tell your story as you go down the page. There’s space for skills, experience, awards, resume, services and event dates and tickets. It’s one template that can do everything and we cannot recommend it enough.

Key features of the Guitarist template

  • WordPress portfolio template for performers
  • Bold design with characterful black and white imagery
  • Tells your story as you go down the page
  • SEO friendly and fully responsive
  • Full compatibility with leading page builders

id-59342.title: Library Cafe
id-59342.post-content:
The Cafe Library template uses warm colors and a fullscreen layout to provide a warm welcome to everyone. It’s designed for cafes and bookshops but could be customized to suit similar small businesses.

There’s lots of page space to highlight features and benefits, an attractive menu section, a map and opening hours section and space for reviews. Everything about the template can be customized to suit your brand using the built-in customization tools or your favorite page builder. 

Key features of the Library Cafe template

  • Warm, engaging small business template
  • Well-designed layout with lots of space for features
  • Attractive map, service and menu sections
  • SEO friendly and fully responsive
  • Full compatibility with leading page builders

It’s designed for cafes and bookshops but could be customized to suit similar small businesses. id-69440.title: Eyewear Store
id-69440.post-content:
The Eyewear online store template is a light and bright full screen template that makes a great first impression. It opens with a fullscreen image, heading and call to action before opening into a full width store page.

The Eyewear Store template has an upmarket feel with quality images, attractive fonts and modern layout. It is SEO-friendly, WooCommerce compatible and works with most page builders, giving you everything you need to build an online store.

Key features of the Eyewear Store template

  • Compelling eCommerce store theme for WordPress
  • Superb colors, fonts and layout
  • Designed to convert
  • Lots of options for showing products
  • Full compatibility with leading page builders
id-69440.post-excerpt: Light and bright eCommerce template designed to sell any product effectively
